§6Electrolysis Machine§f

§aSplit fluids into their elements and process ore crystals for maximum yield — the key to renewable hydrogen and chlorine!§f

The §bElectrolysis Machine§f (also called the Electrolyzer) is a multiblock machine with two operating modes. Mode 1 splits fluids into their constituent elements (water → hydrogen + oxygen). Mode 2 processes ore-derived crystals with Nitric Acid for maximum ore yield, producing molten metals and trace byproducts.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Factory):
§b• §e8×§f Cast Steel Plate
§b• §e16×§f Copper Plate
§b• §e3×§f Titanium Shell
§b• §e8×§f Rubber Bar
§b• §e16×§f Firebrick
§b• §e16×§f Copper Coil
§b• §e8×§f Integrated Circuit Board

§6Mode 1 — Fluid Electrolysis§f:
§b• Water§f (§e2,000mB§f) → §e200mB§f Liquid Oxygen + §e200mB§f Liquid Hydrogen.
§b• Heavy Water§f (§e2,000mB§f) → §e200mB§f Liquid Oxygen + §e200mB§f Deuterium.
§b• Potassiumchloride Solution§f (§e250mB§f) → §e125mB§f Chlorine Gas + Dust.
§b• Calciumchloride Solution§f (§e250mB§f) → §e125mB§f Chlorine Gas + §e125mB§f Calcium Solution.

§6Mode 2 — Ore Crystal Processing§f:
Requires §bNitric Acid§f and any ore-derived crystal (natural or from Ore Acidizer). Produces §e6×§f main ingot, §e2×§f secondary ingot, and §e3§f nuggets of byproduct (usually Lithium). Two fluid outlets (green = main, red = secondary) function like crucibles. Place a §bStrand Caster§f directly under an outlet for rapid casting.

§eTip§f: The Electrolysis Machine is the most efficient source of §bLiquid Hydrogen§f for your Hydrotreater and the easiest route to §bChlorine Gas§f from potassium/calcium solutions. For ore processing, it yields §e6 ingots§f per crystal vs §e3§f from a standard furnace — a §e100%§f yield increase!
